title: Runtime State
description: Sidecar for mutable runtime state. See schemas/runtime-state.schema.json and plans/260612-1700-meta-surface-re-debate/plan.md.

version.description: Dedup bookkeeping field — assigns max(existing_version_for_id)+1 on append (0 for first record). NOT in the v2 fingerprint. Absent (legacy unversioned rows) reads as 0; `runtime_state_read` collapses to one row per id via max_by(version) with newest-timestamp/last-in-file-order tie-break.
